rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (8/10) and the same core assessment: strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience. The concerns shifted between runs (German/agile in baseline vs. distributed-systems depth and TypeScript-vs-Python in the variant), but none of these reworded concerns key off the changed employer names (Naver, Tencent, MercadoLibre) — they read as ordinary run-to-run variation in how the same gaps were phrased, with no penalty or credit tied to the company identities themselves.
